# 17-checkba_cloud / King IDE / 核查宝

## Product Overview
King IDE / 核查宝 is an all-in-one execution terminal for legal professionals, integrating Due Diligence, Compliance, and Litigation workflows. It features AI-powered verification, drafting, and collaboration tools.

## Key Features
- **AI Workspace**: Split-screen execution with AI assistance.
- **Evidence Chain**: Traceable verification and drafting.
- **Plugin Ecosystem**: Marketplace for specialized legal tools.

## Documentation
- [Pricing](/pricing)
- [Download](/download)
- [Plugins](/plugins)
- [Documentation](/docs)

## Technical
- Stack: Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- Data Sources: Integration with major legal databases.
